metadata.description: Clear Capabilities security plugins for Claude Code.

plugins.name: agentic-security
plugins.description: Defensive AppSec for Claude Code: SAST + SCA + Secret scanning with auto-remediation. 50+ vulnerability sinks, 60+ secret patterns, OSV-backed CVE lookup, STRIDE/CWE mapping. NIST AI 600-1 compliance scanner for 122 code-testable GenAI controls.
